raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/24 I purchased a mattress from Macy 's XXXX XXXX using my credit card. I was to be using the XXXX  month interest free payment plan. I had never received a billing notice for this purchase but made a payment in XXXX anyway. 

On XX/XX/24, {$2900.00} was automatically taken out of my checking account to pay this in full. Now I am overdrawn and very concerned about my credit rating. 

Today XX/XX/24 is the first time I noticed this as I went into my bank app and saw that I was overdrawn. I called Macy 's and spoke to " XXXX '' XXXX ID XXXX. I had to give him my checking account number and routing number. 

XXXX logged this information and sent it to his " dispute '' department and said that they will reimburse me in XXXX billing cycles. This means they won't reimburse for XXXX days! 
Meanwhile, I am overdrawn. 

I called the " dispute '' XXXX and left a message. They are only open from XXXX central time XXXX.
